title: GhostMod – The Sinister Minecraft Ghost
description: A mysterious ghost haunts your Minecraft world! It whispers creepy messages, spawns mobs, burns items, and manipulates the environment to scare and troll you. Bilingual (EN/DE) – beware, the Ghost never leaves you alone...
body:
A mysterious, unpredictable ghost haunts you in Minecraft! It manipulates the world around you, plays nasty tricks, and whispers eerie messages—in both German and English. Experience spooky particles, sudden mob spawns, damage, and more. Get ready: this ghost won’t leave you alone!

👻 Ghost’s Troll Features:

Blue flame particles: Surrounds you with creepy ghostly flames.

Ghostly whispers: Sends unsettling multilingual chat messages.

Ignites fire: Occasionally sets fire near your position.

Soul sand traps: Places soul sand as sneaky traps.

Mob spawns: Summons zombies and other monsters suddenly.

Magic damage: Causes random magical damage, mainly in survival mode.

Blindness effect: Temporarily blinds you for extra tension.

Item stealing & burning: Steals items from your inventory and “burns” them away.

Night vision: Grants eerie night vision.

Riddles & messages: Sends dark riddles and haunting messages to disturb you.
